_comment: Account age is calculated from GitHub account creation date to today. Tiers are exclusive upper bounds. Edit this file to adjust tier names, age thresholds, or allowed labels without touching any workflow YAML.
_blocked_note: Accounts younger than blocked_below_years cannot claim ANY issue, bounty-labeled or not. Raise or lower this threshold here.

tiers.name: Junior
tiers.description: Account is 2–4 years old. Starter and standard bounties are accessible.

tiers.name: Senior
tiers.description: Account is 4–7 years old. All bounty tiers are accessible.

tiers.name: Architect
tiers.description: Account is 7–10 years old. All bounty tiers including critical are accessible.

tiers.name: The Old Dogs
tiers.description: Account is 10+ years old. All bounty tiers accessible. Veteran contributor.

messages.newcomer_blocked:
🚫 **Account Too New to Claim Issues**

Hey @{username} — your GitHub account was created on **{account_created}** ({account_age_years} years ago) and does not yet meet this project's minimum contribution longevity requirement of **{blocked_below_years} years**.

> This project uses GitHub account age as a basic anti-spam and anti-bot measure. Genuine contributors build a history over time. If you believe this is an error, please contact a maintainer directly.
messages.tier_mismatch:
🔒 **Contribution Seniority Requirement Not Met**

Hey @{username} — this issue is tagged `{label}` which requires a **{required_tier}** or above (GitHub account age: {min_years}+ years).

Your account was created on **{account_created}**, placing you in the **{user_tier}** tier ({account_age_years} years old). You are not eligible to claim this issue at this time.

> This project uses GitHub account longevity as a basic anti-spam measure. Real contributors build reputation over time — bots and throwaway accounts don't. If you believe this is an error, please contact a maintainer.

You are welcome to work on issues labeled: {allowed_labels}
messages.claim_success: ✅ Issue claimed by @{username} (**{user_tier}**, account age: {account_age_years} years). Good luck!
